transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang,
I have 5 lobsters
And here, I have scallop, abalone, clam, and shrimp!
I'm going to cook Jin Jjamppong spicy seafood noodles with these
This one is 6kg And these are 1.5kg each
Totaling to 12kg
Let's cook the noodles
Bon appetit
I don't know where to start
I'll save the big one for later
Let's eat the broken one first
These came broken
At once!
Done! But it's small
There

Yummy
Will it taste good with the Ramyun soup?
There's 1 more broken claw in here
Let's eat this
That hurts!
If this guy pinched me, I'd be a goner
It's all broken
This one's big too
Let's get the claws first
That's a big one
That's all meat
Very delicious
It's not salty at all
Insane
That looks so delicious
It tastes different

Let's drink some soup
It's tasty
That's crazy
Let's break it apart
Get the head
Take it out
That's a lot of fluid
I'll dip this in the intestines
It has guts, but not much fluid
Dip it
That's insane
I have to eat every bit of it It's so good
Not salty at all
Let's eat the leg What? It's empty?
Nevermind
Meat

Take the joint
Let's get the meat out
Come out!
It's out
Let's cut this one in half
There's meat in here
Lobster noodles with kimchi
I can definitely taste the seafood
[Chat: You got Mr. Krabs!] No~
1 down
These are clams
They said these are good with Ramyun noodles
Delicious
It's good
So soft
Let's finish the noodles already

This is like the noodles cooked right by the ocean
2nd lobster
Let's go from small to big
Check the intestines out
Claws first
Push it out with my fingers
This one's done really well
The claws are the best part
The soup is so savory
Can I do it at once?
Bend it
Take it out
It's easy to take out
Why are the intestines here? Is it for me?
The guts! This is it
This one right here

Can you see it?
Dip it like this
I'll get caught like this
This is the smaller claw
Welcome
I thought the big ones would taste better But that's not the case
This looks like an acupressure
Unbelievable
This can't be real
This is very close to that thing
Imitation crab meat
King crabs taste like Crab Sticks (brand)
The claws are very similar to the imitation crab meat
The big one doesn't taste as good
I can't explain it It's bitter
Salty

Let's try the different parts now The tail. Will that be bad too?
The tail is not bad
Let's check out the guts
Reveal
It has it
Dip it
I'm so happy now
The intestines are amazing
How are you doing?
It's time for me to eat you
This one is a little watery
Because it's been in the soup
It's getting hot in here
I put too much in my mouth
It's a little tough to chew now
Maybe I cooked it too much

It's hard to chew
The small ones have the best intestines
Perfect
Dip it in the guts
So tasty
What is this?
This one is the best one
It's fun to crack the shell
Yum
I will eat more noodles and set this one aside This one is not fully cooked yet
And I'm out of energy
Please go away
I don't want to eat you anymore
Intestines
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
